title: CreateCaseSubsetRequest
description: Schema for CreateCaseSubsetRequest in Nuix REST API

query.description: Query items that should be included in the subset. If a query is not supplied it defaults to an empty string, which returns all items.

location.description: Where the subset case should be created.  e.g. inventory0, inventory1

evidenceStoreCount.description: Specifies the maximum number of evidence stores to create.  Default is 1

includeFamilies.description: Include item families in export.  Default is false

copyTags.description: Copy tags from the source case to the destination case.  Default is false

copyComments.description: Copy comments from the source case to the destination case.  Default is false

copyCustodians.description: Copy custodians from the source case to the destination case.  Default is false

copyItemSets.description: Copy item sets from the source case to the destination case.  Default is false

copyClassifiers.description: Copy classifiers from the source case to the destination case.  Default is false

copyMarkupSets.description: Copy markup sets from the source case to the destination case.  Default is false

copyProductionSets.description: Copy production sets from the source case to the destination case.  Default is false

copyClusters.description: Copy clusters from the source case to the destination case.  Default is false

copyCustomMetadata.description: Copy custom metadata from the source case to the destination case.  Default is false
